title: The Ember Throne
intro: Pyrelord Vazruk roosts upon the Ember Throne beyond the keep. He burned this land once. He means to finish it. End him, and Act One of your legend is written.
objectiveText: Slay Pyrelord Vazruk at the Ember Throne
completeText: The Pyrelord has fallen... Emberrest is saved. Rest, champion — the ashes beyond the mountains await.
